creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
Would you visit the Largest Cherry Blossom Collection in the US!? Free to visit and only a 45 minute train ride from NYC…

*Transit Details are in the caption*

#nyc #NewYork #DayTrip #travel #cherryblossom

transcription.text: Did you know that you can take a 45 minute train ride from Manhattan to the largest collection of cherry blossoms in the United States? And let me just say this place is massive with over 5,000 cherry blossoms, lakes, streams, beautiful flowers, miles of walking trails, and all the colors of the rainbow. This is Branch Brook Park located in Newark, New Jersey.
